ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --color= option Control whether color is used in terminal output.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --comment= option Add a comment to the transaction history.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` -c option Configuration file location.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` -d option This is an integer value between 0 (no additional information strings) and 10 (shows all debugging information, even that not understandable to the user), default is 2.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --debugsolver option Dump data aiding in dependency solver debugging into ./debugdata .

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --disable option Disable specified repositories (automatically saves).

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --disablerepo= option Temporarily disable active repositories for the purpose of the current dnf command.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --downloaddir= option Redirect downloaded packages to provided directory.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --downloadonly option Download the resolved package set without performing any rpm transaction (install/upgrade/erase).
